Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Setting Aide Default And Defualt Judgemnt And Granting Leave To Defend;
Off Calendar Apr-22-2008 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Oct-25-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: K. Farnsworth.
David Cook, Esq. for Plaintiff: California State Automobile Assoc., a California corp.
Plaintiff's Witness: Patrick Hanavan, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Denise Williams aka Leslie Denise Wiliams and dba SAPS., and D'Andre Lewis, dba SAPS. as follows:
Damages $46,065.00
Prejudgment Interest $31,272.36
No Attorney's Fees.
Costs $492.50, for a total of $77,829.86
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up.
